title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Dunzo Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Dunzo Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo Capital India family as a Frontend Developer in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
